member.summary: Interface for logging PCS tokens.

member.summary: Logs PCS tokens.

member.summary: Get the tester type of the TokenLogger.

member.summary: Test method is in charge of logging PCS tokens to ituff.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.LogPcsTokens.PrimeLogPcsTokensTestMethod.ForceAries
member.summary: Gets or sets ForceAries. Forces all ituff output to ARIES even if MIDAS is enabled.

member.summary: Bootstrapper.

member.returns: Unit count and clean count for current socket.
